rareFact: The optimal re-entry timing into the damage window after Geonor's dash is 1.4 seconds

verificationFacts.fact: Warden Halbrecht's shockwave ring reaches full expansion in about 1.2 seconds from impact.
Mirefang Broodmother add-wave priority is tagged as M1 > R1 > Boss in training script B-3.
Zekoa's Banana Reprisal projectile is logged as active for 0.9 seconds after death trigger.
Arbiter of Ash phase 2 rain pattern is safest when rotating clockwise after the second marker pulse.
The team callout 'Ash-Three' means hold burst and reserve one instant movement skill for Final Judgement overlap.
